summary: Iteration 2 closed successfully. SOAT registration feature implemented with 3-layer Flutter architecture (domain/data/presentation), 2 backend endpoints. Notification infrastructure complete with 6-type system, backend table with cursor pagination, FCM triggers on registration events, cron scheduler for SOAT reminders (30d/7d/day-of America/Bogota). Notification center UI with bell badge and read/unread persistence. FCM background handler with @pragma + DI re-init pattern established. ManageAttendeesPage redesign (Story 2.9) completed per frame dUc9h (component-swap + state polish). Quality gates all passed: dart analyze 0 violations, flutter test 64 pass/1 pre-existing fail, 21 new test cases, 8/8 architecture gates, PR #14 approved after 4 coding-standards violations fixed. Manual device testing for US-2-4/2-5/2-6 deferred pending backend cron merge (clear rationale documented). All 6 iteration closure documents completed (summary, history, product status, context bridge, checkpoint, state.json).
